sourcesContent:
// src/captivateDataController.js

class GameDataController {
  constructor() {
    // Initialize all fields you want Captivate to see
    this.data = {
      P1_Name: '',
      P1_Handle: '',
      P1_Avatar: '',
      P1_Aura: '',
      P1_Skill: '',
      P1_Stamina: '',
      P2_Name: '',
      P2_Handle: '',
      P2_Avatar: '',
      P2_Aura: '',
      P2_Skill: '',
      P2_Stamina: '',
      C1_Character: '',
      C1_Image: '',
      C1_Rarity: '',
      C1_RarityImage: '',
      C1_Color: '',
      C1_Score: '',
      C1_Aura: '',
      C1_Skill: '',
      C1_Stamina: '',
      C1_SocialImage: '',
      C1_Tier: '',
      C1_Quote: '',
      C1_VFC: '',
      C1_Card: '',
      C2_Character: '',
      C2_Image: '',
      C2_Rarity: '',
      C2_RarityImage: '',
      C2_Color: '',
      C2_Score: '',
      C2_Aura: '',
      C2_Skill: '',
      C2_Stamina: '',
      C2_SocialImage: '',
      C2_Tier: '',
      C2_Quote: '',
      C2_VFC: '',
      C2_Card: '',
      W_Character: '',
      W_Image: '',
      W_Rarity: '',
      W_RarityImage: '',
      W_Color: '',
      W_Score: '',
      W_Aura: '',
      W_Skill: '',
      W_Stamina: '',
      W_SocialImage: '',
      W_Tier: '',
      W_Quote: '',
      W_VFC: '',
      W_Card: ''
    };

    // On load, notify Captivate of available fields
    if (window.Captivate && typeof window.Captivate.dataUpdated === 'function') {
      window.Captivate.dataUpdated();
    }
  }

  // Captivate will call this to get the latest data
  getData() {
    return this.data;
  }

  // Your app should call this to update the data
  setData(newData) {
    this.data = { ...this.data, ...newData };
    // Notify Captivate of the update
    if (window.Captivate && typeof window.Captivate.dataUpdated === 'function') {
      window.Captivate.dataUpdated();
    }
  }

  // Utility: Map game state to Captivate variable structure and update data
  updateFromGameState(gameState) {
    const mapped = {
      // Player 1
      player1_name: gameState.player1?.name || '',
      player1_handle: gameState.player1?.handle || '',
      player1_avatarUrl: gameState.player1?.avatarUrl || '',
      player1_aura: gameState.player1?.aura || 0,
      player1_skill: gameState.player1?.skill || 0,
      player1_stamina: gameState.player1?.stamina || 0,
      // Player 2
      player2_name: gameState.player2?.name || '',
      player2_handle: gameState.player2?.handle || '',
      player2_avatarUrl: gameState.player2?.avatarUrl || '',
      player2_aura: gameState.player2?.aura || 0,
      player2_skill: gameState.player2?.skill || 0,
      player2_stamina: gameState.player2?.stamina || 0,
      // Card 1
      card1_character: gameState.card1?.character || '',
      card1_imageUrl: gameState.card1?.imageUrl || gameState.card1?.image || '',
      card1_rarity: gameState.card1?.rarity || '',
      card1_rarityImageUrl: gameState.card1?.rarityImageUrl || gameState.card1?.['rarity image'] || '',
      card1_color: gameState.card1?.color || '',
      card1_score: gameState.card1?.score || gameState.card1?.['base score'] || 0,
      card1_aura: gameState.card1?.aura || 0,
      card1_skill: gameState.card1?.skill || 0,
      card1_stamina: gameState.card1?.stamina || 0,
      card1_socialImageUrl: gameState.card1?.socialImageUrl || gameState.card1?.['social image'] || '',
      card1_tier: gameState.card1?.tier || '',
      card1_quote: gameState.card1?.quote || '',
      card1_vfc: gameState.card1?.vfc || '',
      card1_cardId: gameState.card1?.cardId || gameState.card1?.card || '',
      // Card 2
      card2_character: gameState.card2?.character || '',
      card2_imageUrl: gameState.card2?.imageUrl || gameState.card2?.image || '',
      card2_rarity: gameState.card2?.rarity || '',
      card2_rarityImageUrl: gameState.card2?.rarityImageUrl || gameState.card2?.['rarity image'] || '',
      card2_color: gameState.card2?.color || '',
      card2_score: gameState.card2?.score || gameState.card2?.['base score'] || 0,
      card2_aura: gameState.card2?.aura || 0,
      card2_skill: gameState.card2?.skill || 0,
      card2_stamina: gameState.card2?.stamina || 0,
      card2_socialImageUrl: gameState.card2?.socialImageUrl || gameState.card2?.['social image'] || '',
      card2_tier: gameState.card2?.tier || '',
      card2_quote: gameState.card2?.quote || '',
      card2_vfc: gameState.card2?.vfc || '',
      card2_cardId: gameState.card2?.cardId || gameState.card2?.card || '',
      // Winner
      winner_character: gameState.winner?.character || '',
      winner_imageUrl: gameState.winner?.imageUrl || gameState.winner?.image || '',
      winner_rarity: gameState.winner?.rarity || '',
      winner_rarityImageUrl: gameState.winner?.rarityImageUrl || gameState.winner?.['rarity image'] || '',
      winner_color: gameState.winner?.color || '',
      winner_score: gameState.winner?.score || gameState.winner?.['base score'] || 0,
      winner_aura: gameState.winner?.aura || 0,
      winner_skill: gameState.winner?.skill || 0,
      winner_stamina: gameState.winner?.stamina || 0,
      winner_socialImageUrl: gameState.winner?.socialImageUrl || gameState.winner?.['social image'] || '',
      winner_tier: gameState.winner?.tier || '',
      winner_quote: gameState.winner?.quote || '',
      winner_vfc: gameState.winner?.vfc || '',
      winner_cardId: gameState.winner?.cardId || gameState.winner?.card || '',
    };
    this.setData(mapped);
  }
}

// Attach to window so Captivate can find it
window.gameDataController = new GameDataController();

// Optionally, export for use in your app
export default window.gameDataController;
